g.text: Account for who READS and WRITES

g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Inspect

g.text: PAUSES with a BLOCKING clarification on ambiguity OR
a GENERALIZED go-live landmine — any choice whose
correctness depends on a fact NOT grounded in the
inputs (access-path axis + purpose axis, not just
app-config). Surfaces the gap/trade-off instead of
jumping to a solution; never a buried runbook STOP
IaC in the confirmed dialect, then STOPS. NEVER runs
the dialect is explicitly confirmed. One per run
(Bicep XOR Terraform). FULL PARITY — both enforce the
doorway) is generated until dev/staging/prod is
confirmed. No silent default; the skill never assumes
prod- or dev-grade. Purpose RECOMMENDS; the operator
confirms. Secure-by-default is preserved — the vault
stays most-restrictive and any relaxation is explicit.
store must have a named READER and WRITER, each with
an identity and a network path the posture admits.
A read-but-never-written store, or a writer with no
admitted path, is SURFACED as a blocking question —
not shipped as a complete-looking diagram. Surfaces
the connectivity options framed by purpose; operator
